name_cn:
Genuine Quality
Milk Tea Grey, Limited Sale
Reversible Anjou Double-sided Mini Tote. New color Milk Tea Grey. Features imported matching top-grain calfskin 🐂 ➕ custom Goyardine rain-dampened cotton-linen 😘 Exquisite, compact, and lightweight. The interior compartment is just the right size 👌. Reversible design. Includes coin purse and bag charm drawstring closure clip.
Size: Opening 28cm, Base 20*Height 20*Base Width 10cm
🔎020660
